scope: Extended follow-on research: annual RED episode counts predicted from all available annual input series except direct revolution outcomes.
method: Chronological 70/30 train/test split over 1900-2014. Inputs are annualized, standardized on the training period, mean-imputed after standardization, decomposed by PCA, and evaluated with ridge baselines. This is predictive screening, not causal identification.

top_loadings.name: Shiller real total return stock price
Reinhart-Rogoff domestic debt default country count
Reinhart-Rogoff domestic debt default country share
Reinhart-Rogoff external debt default count, including post-1975 official creditors
Reinhart-Rogoff external debt default count, excluding post-1975 official creditors
JST systemic financial crisis country count
JST systemic financial crisis country share
Long-term global food commodity price index
Shiller real long interest rate proxy
Shiller real long interest rate proxy
JST systemic financial crisis country count
JST systemic financial crisis country share
Solar activity (monthly mean total sunspot number)

interpretation: If all-input or PCA models do not beat mean-only and solar-only baselines out of sample, expanded inputs are not yet operationally predictive. If they do, the result identifies predictive structure to investigate, not causal proof.

silso_predicts_inputs.scope: Extended follow-on research: SILSO solar activity used as the sole predictor for each available non-solar, non-revolution input series.
silso_predicts_inputs.method: Each input is treated as a separate annual outcome. SILSO is standardized on the training period and fit with one-variable ridge regression using a chronological 70/30 split over 1900-2014 where enough overlap exists. Rankings are exploratory and mostly diagnose shared cycles or spurious time structure, not causal influence.

silso_predicts_inputs.interpretation: If SILSO appears to predict an input, treat it as a mechanism candidate only when there is a plausible physical pathway and the relationship survives lag, seasonality, geography, and placebo-cycle checks. Otherwise it is best read as a confounding/spurious-cycle screen.
